description: Same wedding with RSVP confirmation vs original invite - should match

content_parts.text:
You are comparing calendar events to detect duplicates.

**New Event:**
- Title: Sarah & Michael's Wedding
- Start: 2026-06-20T16:00:00
- End: 2026-06-20T22:00:00
- Location: Sunset Gardens, Napa Valley
- Description: Thank you for RSVPing! Ceremony at 4pm, reception to follow. Cocktail attire.

**Existing Events (same date):**

1. Event ID: event-001
   - Title: Wedding - Sarah and Michael
   - Start: 2026-06-20T16:00:00
   - End: 2026-06-20T22:00:00
   - Location: Sunset Gardens, Napa
   - Description: You're invited to celebrate our special day!

2. Event ID: event-002
   - Title: Summer BBQ
   - Start: 2026-06-21T12:00:00
   - End: 2026-06-21T16:00:00
   - Location: Central Park
   - Description: Annual neighborhood BBQ

**Question:** Is the new event the same as any of the existing events?

Consider events the same if they refer to the same real-world event, even if:
- Wording is slightly different
- One has more details than the other
- Time changed slightly (updates)

Return the matching Event ID (or null if no match) and brief reasoning.

trace.raw_response_text: {"matched_event_id":"event-001","reasoning":"Both events occur on the same day at the exact same time (16:00-22:00) and location (Sunset Gardens). The titles 'Sarah & Michael's Wedding' and 'Wedding - Sarah and Michael' are clearly referring to the same occasion."}
